claim_policy.score_interpretation: Decision/evidence-readiness scores measure official-proof coverage and source-envelope completeness; they do not measure how much DueSight knows, target quality or whether the target is good or bad.
claim_policy.rule: Risk signals are not treated as final official/legal target claims without authoritative source evidence, identifier confidence and scope proof.
claim_policy.source_bound_context_rule: OSINT, deep-research, proxy and target-owned public evidence should remain visible as source-bound context with source_hardness, confidence, limitation and required_artifact metadata.
claim_policy.memo_language: Use source, source_status, checked_at, freshness, fallback_used, confidence, limitation and diligence question for every memo claim.
claim_policy.upgrade_rule: Verified Pass buys artifact capture, source hardening and permission for stronger wording; it does not buy a favorable finding, higher valuation or predetermined transaction view.
claim_policy.directional_outcome_rule: Directional positive/corrective/adverse bands may be shown as planning ranges for claim hardening; they are not statistical probabilities, valuation forecasts or transaction-outcome predictions.
